title: Crossbowverhaul
body:
Inspired by Balkon's Weapons, this mod aims to reintroduce the classic era crossbow concept,
originally made by BalkondeurAlpha before the 1.14 vanilla introduction

 

Issues are to be reported on the github issue tracker, you can find that one here: issue tracker


-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
This mod is part of Excalibur's Crate, a 1:1 YogBox revival, you can join that modpack's discord here

 

The crossbow now loads slower, using bolts as ammunition instead of arrows,

Multishot now increases to 3 and the crossbow recipe has changed

 

Please note that this replaces the standard crossbow!
[Mobs will also wield this deadly new firepower]

 

Random private messages will be deleted and ignored. There are no comments cause i'm not interested in interacting with the community and i don't enjoy doing that. For bugs: The comments section isn't intended for that, please use the issue tracker and fill out the template.

Also check out this resourcepack made by Rustillery, it added integration with crossbowverhaul: https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/flintlock-to-wheellock/
